title: Local Revenue Sources: Recreational Facilities Bonds
description: Conroe ISD has the authority to issue bonds specifically for building or improving recreational facilities, such as gyms, athletic complexes, or other community spaces. These bonds allow the district to fund major projects without relying solely on its general operating budget, helping preserve everyday resources for classroom needs. Community members may have opportunities to weigh in on bond proposals, making this an important area for residents who want a say in how local facilities are developed and funded.
